title: navarretia liniflora
intro: Navarretia liniflora, also known as threadleaf navarretia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Navarretia liniflora have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing swelling and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Navarretia liniflora often include infusions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of creams and ointments.
